lines.gurmukhi: ਊਚ ਅਪਾਰ ਅਗਨਤ ਹਰਿ ਸਭਿ ਜੀਅ ਜਿਸੁ ਹਾਥਿ ॥
lines.translit: aooch apaar aganat har sabh jeea jis haath |
lines.english: Lofty, infinite and immeasurable is the Lord; all beings are in His Hands.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈ ਜੈ ਕਾਰੁ ਜਗਤ ਮਹਿ ਸਫਲ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਸੇਵ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jai jai kaar jagat meh safal jaa kee sev |1|
lines.english: God is celebrated and acclaimed all over the world; it is fruitful and rewarding to serve Him. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਰਣਾਗਤੀ ਜਤ ਕਤ ਮੇਰੈ ਸਾਥਿ ॥੨॥੧੦॥੭੪॥
lines.translit: naanak prabh saranaagatee jat kat merai saath |2|10|74|
lines.english: Nanak has entered the Sanctuary of God; He is with me everywhere. ||2||10||74||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰਗੁ ਸੰਤਿ ਬਤਾਇਆ ਤੂਟੇ ਜਮ ਜਾਲ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: maarag sant bataaeaa tootte jam jaal |1|
lines.english: The Saint has shown me the Way, and the noose of Death has been cut away. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖ ਭੂਖ ਸੰਸਾ ਮਿਟਿਆ ਗਾਵਤ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਨਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: dookh bhookh sansaa mittiaa gaavat prabh naam |
lines.english: Pain, hunger and scepticism have been dispelled, singing the Name of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਆਰਾਧਿਆ ਹੋਏ ਕਿਰਪਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: gur pooraa aaraadhiaa hoe kirapaal |
lines.english: I worship the Perfect Guru in adoration; He has become merciful to me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜ ਸੂਖ ਆਨੰਦ ਰਸ ਪੂਰਨ ਸਭਿ ਕਾਮ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sehaj sookh aanand ras pooran sabh kaam |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I am blessed with celestial peace, poise, bliss and pleasure, and all my affairs have been perfectly resolved. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਨਿ ਬੁਝੀ ਸੀਤਲ ਭਏ ਰਾਖੇ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਆਪ ॥
lines.translit: jalan bujhee seetal bhe raakhe prabh aap |
lines.english: The fire of desire has been quenched, and I am cooled and soothed; God Himself saved me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸਰਣਾਗਤੀ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਵਡ ਪਰਤਾਪ ॥੨॥੧੧॥੭੫॥
lines.translit: naanak prabh saranaagatee jaa kaa vadd parataap |2|11|75|
lines.english: Nanak has entered the Sanctuary of God; His glorious radiance is so great! ||2||11||75||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਰਤਿ ਸੁਹਾਵੀ ਸਫਲ ਥਾਨੁ ਪੂਰਨ ਭਏ ਕਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: dharat suhaavee safal thaan pooran bhe kaam |
lines.english: The earth is beautified, all places are fruitful, and my affairs are perfectly resolved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਉ ਨਾਠਾ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਮਿਟਿ ਗਇਆ ਰਵਿਆ ਨਿਤ ਰਾਮ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bhau naatthaa bhram mitt geaa raviaa nit raam |1|
lines.english: Fear runs away, and doubt is dispelled, dwelling constantly upon the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧ ਜਨਾ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਬਸਤ ਸੁਖ ਸਹਜ ਬਿਸ੍ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: saadh janaa kai sang basat sukh sehaj bisraam |
lines.english: Dwelling with the humble Holy people, one finds peace, poise and tranquility.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਈ ਘੜੀ ਸੁਲਖਣੀ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: saaee gharree sulakhanee simarat har naam |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Blessed and auspicious is that time, when one meditates in remembrance on the Lord's Name. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਰਣਾਗਤੀ ਘਟ ਘਟ ਸਭ ਜਾਨ ॥੨॥੧੨॥੭੬॥
lines.translit: naanak tis saranaagatee ghatt ghatt sabh jaan |2|12|76|
lines.english: Nanak has come to the Sanctuary of the One who knows each and every heart. ||2||12||76||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਗਟ ਭਏ ਸੰਸਾਰ ਮਹਿ ਫਿਰਤੇ ਪਹਨਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: pragatt bhe sansaar meh firate pahanaam |
lines.english: They have become famous throughout the world; before this, no one even knew their names.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੋਗੁ ਮਿਟਾਇਆ ਆਪਿ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਉਪਜਿਆ ਸੁਖੁ ਸਾਂਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: rog mittaaeaa aap prabh upajiaa sukh saant |
lines.english: God Himself eradicated the disease; peace and tranquility have welled up.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਗੋਵਿੰਦਿ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਕਰੀ ਰਾਖਿਆ ਮੇਰਾ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur govind kripaa karee raakhiaa meraa bhaaee |
lines.english: The Guru, the Lord of the Universe, has shown mercy to me, and saved my brother.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਸਰਣਾਗਤੀ ਜੋ ਸਦਾ ਸਹਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ham tis kee saranaagatee jo sadaa sahaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I am under His Protection; He is always my help and support. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡ ਪਰਤਾਪੁ ਅਚਰਜ ਰੂਪੁ ਹਰਿ ਕੀਨੑੀ ਦਾਤਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: vadd parataap acharaj roop har keenaee daat |1|
lines.english: The Lord blessed me with the gifts of great, glorious radiance and wondrous form. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਜੋਰੁ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਕਾ ਪੂਰਨ ਗੁਣਤਾਸਿ ॥੨॥੧੩॥੭੭॥
lines.translit: naanak jor govind kaa pooran gunataas |2|13|77|
lines.english: Nanak takes the strength of the Perfect Lord of the Universe, the treasure of excellence. ||2||13||77||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਰਥੀ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਜਨ ਕੀ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: birathee kade na hovee jan kee aradaas |
lines.english: The prayer of the Lord's humble servant is never offered in vain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਰਿ ਮਰਿ ਜਨਮੇ ਜਿਨ ਬਿਸਰਿਆ ਜੀਵਨ ਕਾ ਦਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: mar mar janame jin bisariaa jeevan kaa daataa |
lines.english: Those who forget the Giver of life, die, over and over again, only to be reborn and die.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਜਨਿ ਸੇਵਿਆ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: paarabraham jan seviaa anadin rang raataa |1|
lines.english: The humble servant of the Supreme Lord God serves Him; night and day, he remains imbued with His Love. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਂਤਿ ਸਹਜੁ ਆਨਦੁ ਘਨਾ ਪੂਰਨ ਭਈ ਆਸ ॥
lines.translit: saant sehaj aanad ghanaa pooran bhee aas |
lines.english: I have found peace, tranquility and great ecstasy; my hopes have been fulfilled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ਜਨ ਤੁਮੑ ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ॥
lines.translit: sun suaamee aradaas jan tuma antarajaamee |
lines.english: O my Lord and Master, please listen to the prayer of Your humble servant; You are the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਗੁਣਤਾਸ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sukh paaeaa har saadhasang simarat gunataas |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I have found peace in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy; I meditate in remembrance on the Lord, the treasure of virtue. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਾਨ ਥਨੰਤਰਿ ਰਵਿ ਰਹੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੇ ਸੁਆਮੀ ॥੨॥੧੪॥੭੮॥
lines.translit: thaan thanantar rav rahe naanak ke suaamee |2|14|78|
lines.english: Nanak's Lord and Master is permeating and pervading all places and interspaces. ||2||14||78||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਉਗਿਰਦ ਹਮਾਰੈ ਰਾਮ ਕਾਰ ਦੁਖੁ ਲਗੈ ਨ ਭਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: chaugirad hamaarai raam kaar dukh lagai na bhaaee |1|
lines.english: On all four sides I am surrounded by the Lord's Circle of Protection; pain does not afflict me, O Siblings of Destiny. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾਤੀ ਵਾਉ ਨ ਲਗਈ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਸਰਣਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: taatee vaau na lagee paarabraham saranaaee |
lines.english: The hot wind does not even touch one who is under the Protection of the Supreme Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਭੇਟਿਆ ਜਿਨਿ ਬਣਤ ਬਣਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: satigur pooraa bhettiaa jin banat banaaee |
lines.english: I have met the Perfect True Guru, who has done this deed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਉਖਧੁ ਦੀਆ ਏਕਾ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam aaukhadh deea ekaa liv laaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He has given me the medicine of the Lord's Name, and I enshrine love for the One Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਖਿ ਲੀਏ ਤਿਨਿ ਰਖਨਹਾਰਿ ਸਭ ਬਿਆਧਿ ਮਿਟਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: raakh lee tin rakhanahaar sabh biaadh mittaaee |
lines.english: The Savior Lord has saved me, and eradicated all my sickness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਭਈ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਏ ਸਹਾਈ ॥੨॥੧੫॥੭੯॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak kirapaa bhee prabh bhe sahaaee |2|15|79|
lines.english: Says Nanak, God has showered me with His Mercy; He has become my help and support. ||2||15||79||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਲਾਵਲੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: bilaaval mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Bilaaval, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਣੇ ਬਾਲਕ ਆਪਿ ਰਖਿਅਨੁ ਪਾਰਬ੍ਰਹਮ ਗੁਰਦੇਵ ॥
lines.translit: apane baalak aap rakhian paarabraham guradev |
lines.english: The Supreme Lord God, through the Divine Guru, has Himself protected and preserved His children.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਸਹਜ ਆਨਦ ਭਏ ਪੂਰਨ ਭਈ ਸੇਵ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sukh saant sehaj aanad bhe pooran bhee sev |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Celestial peace, tranquility and bliss have come to pass; my service has been perfect. ||1||Pause||
